compiled_state.title: Decouple residual dso: references from rebar (rename echo marker, evaluate completion-verifier close gate, drop stale plugin tests)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: 1. Rename reconciler echo marker dso:reconciler-echo -> rebar:reconciler-echo (wire-format token in Jira comments; assess back-compat with existing echoes). 2. Evaluate how dso:completion-verifier is wired in and whether the completion/verdict hash is required for close. 3. Remove stale tests asserting old /dso: plugin slash-command behavior.
